ModMetaData.name: Common Mod Compatibility Patches
ModMetaData.author: RunningBugs
ModMetaData.description:
A small collection of runtime compatibility patches for commonly used RimWorld mods. Every target-mod patch is dynamically detected at startup: if the corresponding mod/type/method is absent, the patch is skipped silently.
Current patches: - Allow Tool: guard stale cached Haul Urgently things before RimWorld hauling APIs. - Build From Inventory / Replace Stuff: guard vanilla pathfinder reservation notifications for inventory-held or unspawned reservation targets. - Replace Stuff / TinyTweaks: guard Replace Stuff automatic bridge placement helper against null/invalid blueprint contexts.
Target mods are listed under loadAfter, not as dependencies, so this mod can stay enabled even when some target mods are not installed.
